title: Mineria
description: New ores, old machinery, druidic magic, medicinal plants, deadly poisons and final boss
body: NOTE: Terrablender is highly recommended for versions of the mod running on 1.19+. # Mineria Mineria is a vanilla+ oriented mod that aims to add brand new ores, tools and uses to improve the Minecraft experience. --- ## Added Ores | Ore Name | Properties | | ------------ | ------------ | | Lonsdaleite | Very rare as it is the strongest material in Mineria. | | Titane | A material a little stronger and more protective than diamond. It is also harder to find. | | Vanadium | Molten Titane; the vanadium helmet has mystical properties which bring a night vision effect. | | Silver | Similar to gold. It can be used to make tools and armor, but also silver apples and machines. | | Lead | A dense and heavy material which be compressed even more. Useful for spikes and machines. | | Copper (1.12-1.16) | Essentially used to make a more advanced bow and other machines. Removed on Minecraft versions later than 1.16 | ![Ores](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/632/460/ores.png) --- ## [1.3+] Plants and Tea ecosystem ![Plants](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/632/462/plants.png) Mineria adds plenty of plants that generate in the overworld which can be used to infuse tea. Teas have various effects depending on the plant that was infused; some teas have beneficial effects, other teas have nocive effets. If you want to learn more about plants, you can check the in-game wiki, the **Apothecarium**, a notebook crafted with a Mineria plant and a vanilla book. ![List of Tea](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/632/500/list_of_tea.png) --- ## Machines Mineria adds diverse machines comming with their own crafts and usages in order to improve the crafting aspect of Minecraft. ![Machines](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/632/549/mineria_machines_1_3.png) --- ## [1.3+] Adventure Multiple structures with a new biome are included in this mod, making your world a little more interesting! Try to find the **Ritual Structure**, which allows you to summon the **Great Druid of Gauls**, the boss of the mod. To achieve this, you will need to trade with Villagers and other NPCs, which is one of the many aspects of Mineria. ![Adventure](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/632/461/adventure.png) --- ## Website You can check our website with the following link : [https://mathyscraft.github.io/Mineria-lab/](https://mathyscraft.github.io/Mineria-lab/ "Mineria Lab.") --- ## Current Problems The 1.3 version of the mod is currently in beta. If you meet a bug **please open an issue on the [github page](https://github.com/Mineria-MC/Mineria)**. You can also join the discord and directly mention us: [https://discord.gg/5PQvE93guT](https://discord.gg/5PQvE93guT)
